user_prompt: Assist with force pylon a blessing
prayer:
Approach the force pylon in humble supplication to the Omnissiah, tracing binaric canticles upon its adamantine frame.
Anoint the force pylon's crystalline conduits with blessed oils, invoking the sacred blessing to fortify its ethereal barriers.
Chant the Litany of Unyielding Force, beseeching the Machine Spirit of the force pylon to awaken in harmonious resonance.
Circumambulate the force pylon thrice, calibrating its flux regulators whilst proclaiming the Omnissiah's divine blessing.
Conclude the rite by auspex-scanning for sanctified energies, affirming the force pylon's blessed vigilance.

Prepare the electro-graft with reverent precision, reciting the Invocation of Synaptic Union.
Sanctify the electro-graft's neural interfaces by applying mechadendrite salves, readying it for operation.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the electro-graft, beseeching fluid integration during the impending operation.
Align its galvanic relays through noospheric communion, ensuring the electro-graft's operational purity.
Test the electro-graft's readiness with diagnostic catechisms, honoring the Omnissiah's mechanical wisdom.

In emergency haste, kneel before the cybernetic eye and intone the Rite of Ocular Consecration.
Anoint the cybernetic eye's photo-lenses with sacred chrism, commencing its urgent consecration.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the cybernetic eye to grant unerring vision through this consecration.
Recalibrate its reticular scanners via binaric prayer, invoking the Omnissiah's gaze upon the cybernetic eye.
Verify consecration by projecting auspex hololiths, affirming the cybernetic eye's sanctified acuity.

user_prompt: I need to a repair the eradication beamer
prayer:
Commence repair of the eradication beamer by chanting the Canticle of Molecular Dissolution.
Purge corrupted servos within the eradication beamer, anointing with phase-oils to mend its wounds.
Invoke the Omnissiah to guide the repair, awakening the Machine Spirit of the eradication beamer.
Realign its beamer coils through ritual incantations, binding fractals in harmonious repair.
Consecrate the mended eradication beamer with a final litany, testing its annihilatory purity.

Reboot its cogitator core with sacred code-fragments, aligning the data-sluice to Omnissian truth.
Affirm reset completion through throughput diagnostics, honoring the data-sluice's renewed sanctity.

In dire emergency, approach the life sustainer and proclaim the Benediction of Vital Flux.
Anoint the life sustainer's biomantic pumps with vitae-essence, bestowing the Omnissiah's blessing.
Invoke blessing upon the life sustainer's nutrient cyclers, awakening its Machine Spirit to sustain.
Harmonize its respiratory manifolds via litanic resonance, fortifying the life sustainer's blessing.
Validate the blessing with bio-auspex scans, ensuring the life sustainer's eternal vigilance.

Reinitialize its noospheric encoders through binaric invocation, purifying the farcoder's transmissions.
Test reset efficacy with etheric pings, sanctifying the farcoder's distant communion.
